welcome to our garden

Ο Μπαξές

O Baxes Taverna

— σερβίρουμε κυπριακούς μεζέδες με μεράκι —

A family-run Cypriot taverna in Agia Fyla. Charcoal-grilled meats, traditional meze, and our own house wine — served under the fig trees of our courtyard.

Reserve a Table See the Menu Order Online
Instagram Facebook
scroll
our story

Our Story

Μπαξές means "garden" in Cypriot — and that's the heart of what we do.

Run by Panikos, the taverna sits inside a restored old house on 1st April Street in Agia Fyla, with a stone courtyard shaded by fig and mulberry trees. In summer, everyone eats outside. In winter, we move indoors next to the fireplace.

The food is traditional Cypriot — souvlaki and sheftalia over charcoal, lamb on the spit, halloumi grilled fresh, vine leaves rolled by hand. Almost everything comes from local producers, and we bottle our own house wine on site.

On most evenings there's live music. Tables fill up, friends find each other across the courtyard, and the meal tends to run longer than planned. The courtyard is also a favourite spot for private events — christenings, birthdays, and family celebrations of every kind. That's the way we like it.

food & drink

Our Menu

Our meze is the best way to experience the full table — a selection of small plates served course by course. Or order à la carte from the grill.

The Meze

The full Cypriot table: dips, salads, halloumi, sheftalia, souvlaki, lamb from the spit, sides, and fresh fruit at the end. Served course by course.

€25 per person · minimum 2 guests

our space

The Courtyard

Our courtyard is shaded by fig and mulberry trees, with long tables set under the leaves. It's lively on weekends — families, friends, live music. In winter, the indoor space and fireplace take over.

Whether it's a quiet dinner or a large celebration, there's a table for you here.

reviews

What Guests Say

★★★★★

One of the best taverns in all Cyprus! Food was so amazing and some of the dishes were very unique even for Cyprus and were so delicious! Atmosphere and the staff were on a very high level! Definitely highly recommend!

Anna Mishenkova
Google
★★★★★

Went on a Saturday without a booking and, even with a large party going on, they still managed to get us a table. Amazing service and really good food. Highly recommend!

Ebba Wass
Google
★★★★★

Baxes was a great taverna, all the staff were super friendly and their food was genuinely amazing. Coming from a Cypriot background from London, I typically find that some souvla places are not great, but this was amazing. Everything from the salad, to their Pork & Chicken Souvla was fresh, even the chips and pittas. Panikos and his staff were great. Will be back!

Andrew Michael
Google
★★★★★

A nice place, seating is outside with a bar and the kitchen where they BBQ the food, and tables under trees and grape vines. The guys are great and helpful as well as funny. We had the meze, excellent stuff, the food don't stop coming. Live entertainment — guys go round tables and sing for you by your side. Nice touch. Keep it up guys!

Chris P · Local Guide
Google
★★★★★

What a total pleasure in every possible way! We found Baxes by accident and walked into the cutest little courtyard ever. Greeted with a smile and given a great table, we relaxed into the great atmosphere. We ordered house wine which was delicious and then the meze started… We were totally blown away. The food is cooked with actual love. The meat is softer than butter, the salad is fresh. The whole team are just wonderful people. Thanks also to Pani, Baxes is a delight!

Sophie Eliades · Local Guide
Google

reserve your table

Book a Table

Fill in your details and we'll open WhatsApp with your request ready to send. Panikos will confirm your table directly. We also welcome private events and celebrations.

Prefer to call? Ring us on 25 771 001 or 97 839 621.
